parameters.message:
={{ $('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt ? '

' : '' }}

{{ $json.title }} (Edited)

Premise: {{ $json.outline?.premise }}

Themes

    {{ ($json.outline?.themes || []).map(t => '
  • ' + t + '
    • ').join('') }}

Characters

{{ ($json.outline?.characters || []).map(c => '').join('') }}
NameRoleArc
' + c.name + '' + c.role + '' + c.arc + '

Section Outline

{{ ($json.outline?.chapters || []).map(ch => '
Section ' + ch.number + ': ' + ch.title + '
' + ch.brief + '
Arc: ' + (ch.arc_notes || '') + '
').join('') }}

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: =Outline edited for "{{ $('save_edited_outline').item.json.title }}". Changes applied and emailed. Previous version auto-saved — use "outline version history" to see versions.
